subject: ap-chemistry
title: Chemical Equilibrium
stimulus:
The polyatomic ion C
H
N
O
4−
is commonly abbreviated as
EDTA4−
. The ion can form complexes with
metal ions in aqueous solutions. A complex of EDTA4− with Ba2+ ion forms according to the equation
above. A 50.0 mL volume of a solution that has an
EDTA4−
(aq) concentration of 0.30 M is mixed with 50.0 mL
of 0.20 M Ba(NO ) to produce 100.0 mL of solution.

parts.prompt:
Considering the value of K for the reaction, determine the concentration of
Ba(EDTA)2−
(aq) in the
100.0 mL of solution. Justify your answer.

scoring_points.description: State the correct answer with a valid chemical justification

required_elements: Valid justification based on chemical principles
alternatives.correct_example: Considering the value of Kfor the reaction, d etermine the concentration of Ba(EDTA)2(aq)in the 100.0 mL of solution. Justify your answer. Based on the K value, the reaction goes essentially to completion. Ba2+(aq)is the limiting reactant. The concentration ofBa2+when the solutions are first mixed but before any reaction takes place is 0.20 M/2 = 0.10 M. Thus the equilibrium concentration ofBa(EDTA)2(aq)is 0.10 M

common_traps: Stating answer without connecting to the underlying chemical principle

parts.prompt:
The solution is diluted with distilled water to a total volume of 1.00 L. After equilibrium has been
reestablished, is the number of moles of Ba2+(aq) present in the solution greater than, less than, or equal to
the number of moles of Ba2+(aq) present in the original solution before it was diluted? Justify your answer.

scoring_points.description: State the correct answer with a valid chemical justification

required_elements: Valid justification based on chemical principles
alternatives.correct_example: The solution is diluted with distilled water to a total volume of 1.00 L. After equilibrium has been reestablished, is the number of moles of Ba2+(aq)present in the solution greater than, less than, or equal to the number of moles of Ba2+(aq)present in the original solution before it was diluted? Justify your answer. The number of moles of Ba2+(aq)increases because the percent dissociation of Ba(EDTA )2(aq)increases as the solution is diluted. common_traps: Stating answer without connecting to the underlying chemical principle
